welcome.subject: Welcome to STEPMOTECH - Your Industrial Motion Control Partner
welcome.heading: Welcome to STEPMOTECH!
welcome.body: Thank you for joining STEPMOTECH. You now have access to our complete catalog of industrial motion control solutions including stepper motors, drivers, and precision components.
welcome.support: Need help? Contact our technical support team

orderConfirmation.subject: Order Confirmation - Order #{orderNumber}
orderConfirmation.heading: Thank you for your order!
orderConfirmation.body: Your order #{orderNumber} has been confirmed and is being processed. You will receive a shipping notification once your order is on its way.
orderConfirmation.support: Questions about your order? Reply to this email or contact our support team.

shippingNotification.subject: Your order #{orderNumber} has shipped!
shippingNotification.heading: Your order is on its way!
shippingNotification.body: Great news! Your order #{orderNumber} has been shipped and should arrive soon.
shippingNotification.support: Need assistance? Contact our customer service team.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your STEPMOTECH password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset Request
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password. This link will expire in 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.support: Need help? Contact our support team.

quoteRequest.subject: Quote Request Received - {quoteNumber}
quoteRequest.heading: Thank you for your quote request!
quoteRequest.body: We have received your quote request and our team is reviewing your requirements. You can expect a detailed quotation within 24-48 hours.
quoteRequest.support: Need to modify your request? Reply to this email or contact our sales team.

newsletter.subject: STEPMOTECH Newsletter - {month} {year}
newsletter.heading: This Month at STEPMOTECH
newsletter.body: Here's what's new in industrial motion control this month:
newsletter.unsubscribe: You're receiving this because you subscribed to STEPMOTECH newsletter.

inquiryResponse.subject: Response to your inquiry - {inquiryId}
inquiryResponse.heading: We've responded to your inquiry
inquiryResponse.body: Our technical team has reviewed your inquiry and provided a detailed response. Please review the information below.
inquiryResponse.support: Have additional questions? Reply directly to this email.
